package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_grpc_metadata_parsed_repeatedly: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag repeated metadata extraction/parsing in gRPC interceptors and handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule536NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario536Negative(records []Rule536NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
